head: 1820317f049ff8f935c1278cc0cab984cdb9abbd

commits.subject: fix(0.8.20): cfg-gate is_erasure_bookkeeping_collection to silence non-operator dead_code
docs(0.8.20): Slice-5 re-close — multi-doc attribution regression fixed, isolated Python verification

task_a.change: Added #[cfg(feature = "operator")] to is_erasure_bookkeeping_collection (engine/src/lib.rs:196 pre-edit), matching its sole call site inside the operator-gated excise_collection_record. Doc comment explains the gate. No #[allow(dead_code)] used.
task_a.warning_before: warning: function `is_erasure_bookkeeping_collection` is never used --> src/rust/crates/fathomdb-engine/src/lib.rs:196:4 (note: #[warn(dead_code)] on by default)
task_a.warning_after_non_operator: NONE — `cargo clippy -p fathomdb-engine --all-targets 2>&1 | grep -i dead_code` returns nothing (grep rc=1), clippy rc=0
task_a.still_compiled_under_operator: YES — `cargo clippy -p fathomdb-engine --all-targets --features operator` rc=0; guard test erasure_bookkeeping_collections_are_not_excisable PASSES
task_a.no_new_rustdoc_warnings: verified — cargo doc -p fathomdb-engine --no-deps warning count unchanged at 26; no warning mentions is_erasure_bookkeeping_collection

gates.note: explicit non-operator invocation per TC-25; reports 3 not a vacuous 0

gate_note: All exit codes read via $? / PIPESTATUS on the actual command, never a trailing echo.

prohibitions_honored.ac_079_not_marked_signed: board still reads AWAITING HITL SIGN-OFF, NOT SIGNED

facts_verified_before_writing_board.resolve_provenance: closure at engine/src/lib.rs:3933-3943 (post-fix-5 numbering); single-element batch short-circuits, else echo REQUIRED and must match a caller id. Entity loop at :3972, resolves at :3979
facts_verified_before_writing_board.harness_symmetric_backfill: elps_live_harness.py:233-237 backfills BOTH entity and edge source_doc_id
facts_verified_before_writing_board.py_search_hit_source_id: fathomdb-py/src/lib.rs:537-539 — doc says set only for graph-arm hits, None for every two-arm hit

discrepancy_found.severity: minor — line-number imprecision only, substance CONFIRMED
discrepancy_found.detail: The task cited resolve_provenance at engine/src/lib.rs:3946-3956. The closure actually lives at :3933-3943 (post-fix-5); :3946-3956 is the entities/raw_edges extraction. The cited entity-loop line :3972 IS correct. The substantive claim (echo admitted only as a selector; multi-doc batch must name a caller id or fail) is confirmed verbatim by the code. Board was written with the VERIFIED line numbers, not the cited ones.
